'''Mauit'ta''' was an officer of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]].

During the [[Black Fleet Crisis]], [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] Mauit'ta served as a staff intelligence officer aboard [[Intrepid (Endurance-class)|''Intrepid'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}}
*[[Tyrant's Test (abridged audiobook)|''Tyrant's Test'' abridged audiobook]]
